name: hs_content_membership_email

description: Email Confirmation status of user of Content Membership

description: Domain to which the registration invitation email for Content Membership was sent to

name: hs_content_membership_registration_email_sent_at

description: Datetime at which this user was sent a registration invitation email for Content Membership

name: hs_data_privacy_ads_consent
label: Ads Consent from Forms
description: This property captures ads consents from forms and is used by consentmanager to create / update associated data privacy consent objects

name: hs_email_bad_address
label: Invalid email address
description: The email address associated with this contact is invalid.

name: hs_email_bounce
label: Marketing emails bounced
description: The number of marketing emails that bounced for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_click
label: Marketing emails clicked
description: The number of marketing emails which have had link clicks for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_customer_quarantined_reason
label: Email address quarantine reason
description: The reason why the email address has been quarantined.

name: hs_email_delivered
label: Marketing emails delivered
description: The number of marketing emails delivered for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_click_date
label: First marketing email click date
description: The date of the earliest link click for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_open_date
label: First marketing email open date
description: The date of the earliest open for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_reply_date
label: First marketing email reply date
description: The date of the earliest reply for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_send_date
label: First marketing email send date
description: The date of the earliest delivery for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_hard_bounce_reason
label: Email hard bounce reason
description: The issue that caused a contact to hard bounce from your emails. If this is an error or a temporary issue, you can unbounce this contact from the contact record.

name: hs_email_hard_bounce_reason_enum
label: Email hard bounce reason
description: The issue that caused a contact to hard bounce from your emails. If this is an error or a temporary issue, you can unbounce this contact from the contact record.

name: hs_email_is_ineligible
label: Is globally ineligible
description: Indicates the contact is globally ineligible for email.

name: hs_email_last_click_date
label: Last marketing email click date
description: The date of the most recent link click for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_email_name
label: Last marketing email name
description: The name of the last marketing email sent to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_open_date
label: Last marketing email open date
description: The date of the most recent open for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_reply_date
label: Last marketing email reply date
description: The date of the latest reply for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_send_date
label: Last marketing email send date
description: The date of the most recent delivery for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_open
label: Marketing emails opened
description: The number of marketing emails opened for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_optimal_send_day_of_week
label: Optimal Marketing Email Send Day of Week

name: hs_email_optimal_send_time_of_day
label: Optimal Marketing Email Send Time of Day

name: hs_email_optout
label: Unsubscribed from all email
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of all email.

name: hs_email_optout_1998000142
label: Opted out of email: Marketing Information
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_optout_1998000146
label: Opted out of email: One to One
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_optout_2072894745
label: Opted out of email: Customer Service Communication
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_quarantined
label: Email Address Quarantined
description: Indicates that the current email address has been quarantined for anti-abuse reasons and any marketing email sends to it will be blocked. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_quarantined_reason
label: Email address automated quarantine reason
description: The automated reason why the email address has been quarantined.

options.label: Microsoft Undeliverable - Microsoft reports that address is inactive

name: hs_email_recipient_fatigue_recovery_time
label: Email Address Recipient Fatigue Next Available Sending Time
description: When this recipient has reached the limit of email sends per time period, this property indicates the next available time to send. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_replied
label: Marketing emails replied
description: The number of marketing emails replied to by the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_sends_since_last_engagement
label: Sends Since Last Engagement
description: The number of marketing emails that have been sent to the current email address since the last engagement (open or link click). This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_type
label: Email type
description: Used to determine if a given property is a personal email or work email

name: hs_emailconfirmationstatus
label: Marketing email confirmation status
description: The status of a contact's eligibility to receive marketing email. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_employment_change_detected_date
label: Employment change detected date
description: Date contact confirmed no longer employed at current company

name: hs_enriched_email_bounce_detected
label: Enriched Email Bounce Detected (Deprecated)
description: Bounce Detected attribute is no longer being populated/updated after 10/31/2025. In order to receive signals about an email address becoming undeliverable or no longer valid for the contact, please use Intent Signals.

name: hs_feedback_last_csat_survey_date
label: Last CSAT survey date
description: The time that this contact last submitted a CSAT survey response. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

label: Last CSAT survey comment

name: hs_feedback_last_csat_survey_rating
label: Last CSAT survey rating

name: hs_feedback_show_nps_web_survey
label: Should be shown an NPS web survey
description: Whether or not a contact should be shown an NPS web survey. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_first_subscription_create_date
label: First subscription create date
description: The create date of the first subscription by the contact.

name: hs_has_active_subscription
label: Contact has an active subscription
description: The rollup property value is 1 when the contact has an active Subscription or 0 otherwise.

name: hs_job_change_detected_date
label: Job change detected date
description: Date contact confirmed no longer employed at current company

name: hs_latest_subscription_create_date
label: Latest subscription create date
description: The create date of the latest subscription by the contact.

name: hs_legal_basis
label: Legal basis for processing contact's data
description: Legal basis for processing contact's data; 'Not applicable' will exempt the contact from GDPR protections

name: hs_marketable_reason_id
label: Marketing contact status source name
description: The ID of the activity that set the contact as a marketing contact

name: hs_marketable_reason_type
label: Marketing contact status source type
description: The type of the activity that set the contact as a marketing contact

name: hs_marketable_status
label: Marketing contact status
description: The marketing status of a contact

name: hs_marketable_until_renewal
label: Marketing contact until next update
description: Specifies if this contact will be set as non-marketing on renewal

name: hs_quarantined_emails
label: Quarantined Emails
description: Lists all emails associated with this contact that have been quarantined, with a source and reason.

name: hs_registration_method
label: Registration Method
description: The method used for registration

name: hs_returning_to_office_detected_date
label: Returning to office detected date
description: Date detected from email that contact will return to the office

name: surveymonkeyeventlastupdated
label: SurveyMonkey Event Last Updated
description: This field is meaningless on its own, and is solely used for triggering dynamic list updates when SurveyMonkey information is updated

name: webinareventlastupdated
label: Webinar Event Last Updated
description: This field is meaningless on its own, and is solely used for triggering dynamic list updates when webinar information is updated

name: currentlyinworkflow
label: Currently in workflow (discontinued)
description: True when contact is enrolled in a workflow.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked
label: Date of last meeting booked in meetings tool
description: The date of the last meeting that has been scheduled by a contact through the meetings tool. If multiple meetings have been scheduled, the date of the last chronological meeting in the timeline is shown.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked_campaign
label: Campaign of last booking in meetings tool
description: UTM parameter for marketing campaign (e.g. a specific email) responsible for recent meeting booking. Only populated when tracking parameters are included in meeting link.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked_medium
label: Medium of last booking in meetings tool
description: UTM parameter for the channel (e.g. email)  responsible for most recent meeting booking. Only populated when tracking parameters are included in meeting link.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked_source
label: Source of last booking in meetings tool
description: UTM parameter for the site (e.g. Twitter) responsible for most recent meeting booking. Only populated when tracking parameters are included in meeting link.

name: first_conversion_date
label: First Conversion Date
description: Date  this  contact  first  submitted  a  form.

name: first_conversion_event_name
label: First Conversion

label: Chat Assistant Source
description: Which chat assistant the QL is being generated from

label: Chat Assistant:Summary

label: Membership Notes

name: hs_content_membership_status
label: Status
description: Status of the contact's content membership.

name: hs_feedback_last_ces_survey_rating

name: hs_feedback_last_nps_follow_up
label: Last NPS survey comment

name: hs_feedback_last_survey_date
label: Last NPS survey date
description: The time that this contact last submitted a NPS survey response. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_last_sales_activity_timestamp
label: Last Engagement Date
description: The last time a contact engaged with your site or a form, document, meetings link, or tracked email. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts.

name: hs_last_sms_send_date
label: Last Sms Send Date
description: This stores the date of the last SMS sent

name: hs_last_sms_send_name
label: Last SMS Send Name
description: Name of the last SMS sent to the contact

name: hs_predictivecontactscore
label: Predictive Lead Score
description: A score calculated by HubSpot that represents a contact's likelihood to become a customer

name: hs_predictivecontactscore_v2
label: Likelihood to close
description: The probability that a contact will become a customer within the next 90 days. This score is based on standard contact properties and behavior.

name: hs_predictivecontactscorebucket
label: Lead Rating
description: The rating of this contact based on their predictive lead score

name: hs_predictivescoringtier
label: Contact priority
description: A ranking system of contacts evenly assigned into four tiers. Contacts in tier one are more likely to become customers than contacts in tier four.

name: hs_sales_email_last_clicked
label: Recent Sales Email Clicked Date
description: The last time a tracked sales email was clicked by this user

name: hs_sales_email_last_opened
label: Recent Sales Email Opened Date
description: The last time a tracked sales email was opened by this contact. This property does not update for emails that were sent to more than one contact.

name: hs_sales_email_last_replied
label: Recent Sales Email Replied Date
description: The most recent email from this contact that was received and logged by HubSpot. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_sequences_is_enrolled
label: Currently in Sequence
description: A yes/no field that indicates whether the contact is currently in a Sequence.

name: hs_whatsapp_phone_number

name: message
label: Message
description: A default property to be used for any message or comments a contact may want to leave on a form.

name: notes_last_contacted
label: Last Contacted
description: The last time a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, sales email, SMS, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: notes_last_updated
label: Last Activity Date
description: The last time a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, note, sales email, SMS, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: notes_next_activity_date

description: The date of the next upcoming activity for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: num_contacted_notes
label: Number of times contacted

name: num_notes
label: Number of Sales Activities
description: The number of times a call, chat conversation, LinkedIn message, postal mail, meeting, note, sales email, SMS, task, or WhatsApp message was logged for a contact record. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

description: if contact is assigned and worked, set to 1. if contact is assigned and unworked, set to 0.

name: hs_last_sales_activity_date

name: annualrevenue
label: Annual Revenue
description: Annual company revenue

name: closedate
label: Close Date
description: Date the  contact  became  a  customer. Set automatically when a deal or opportunity is marked as closed-won. It can also be set manually or programmatically.

name: days_to_close
label: Days To Close
description: Count of days elapsed between creation and being closed as a customer. Set automatically.

name: first_deal_created_date
label: First Deal Created Date
description: Date first deal was created for contact. Set automatically.

name: hs_buying_role
label: Buying Role
description: Role the contact plays during the sales process. Contacts can have multiple roles, and can share roles with others.

name: hs_first_closed_order_id
label: First Closed Order ID
description: The id of the associated order that was first to be closed

name: hs_first_order_closed_date
label: First Order Closed Date
description: Date first order was closed. Set Automatically

name: hs_recent_closed_order_date
label: Recent Closed Order Date
description: Date last order was closed. Set automatically.

name: num_associated_deals
label: Number of Associated Deals
description: Count of deals associated with this contact. Set automatically by HubSpot.

name: recent_deal_amount
label: Recent Deal Amount
description: Amount of last closed won deal associated with a contact. Set automatically.

name: recent_deal_close_date
label: Recent Deal Close Date
description: Date last deal associated with contact was closed-won. Set automatically.

name: total_revenue
label: Total Revenue
description: Sum of all closed-won deal revenue associated with the contact. Set automatically.

name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
label: All teams
description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_owner_ids
label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_cross_account_note
label: Cross-Account Note
description: Add cross-account note property to Contact, allowing users to set a note when copying or editing a contact in another account.

name: hs_cross_sell_opportunity
label: Cross-sell Opportunity
description: Identify a contact as a good candidate for cross-selling programs.

name: hs_currently_enrolled_in_prospecting_agent
label: Currently Enrolled in Prospecting Agent
description: Indicates whether or not the contact has an active prospecting agent enrollment

name: hs_is_unworked
label: Contact unworked
description: Contact  has  not  been  assigned  or  has  not  been  engaged  after  last  owner  assignment/re-assignment

name: hs_journey_stage
label: Journey Stage
description: Track the status of a contact through a customer journey. It can be set through journeys, manually on a per contact basis, and through other tools.

name: hs_latest_sequence_ended_date
label: Last sequence ended date
description: The last sequence ended date.

name: hs_latest_sequence_enrolled
label: Last sequence enrolled
description: The last sequence enrolled.

label: Last sequence enrolled date
description: The last sequence enrolled date.

name: hs_latest_sequence_finished_date
label: Last sequence finished date
description: The last sequence finished date.

name: hs_latest_sequence_unenrolled_date
label: Last sequence unenrolled date
description: The last sequence unenrolled date.

name: hs_lead_status
label: Lead Status
description: The contact's sales, prospecting or outreach status

name: hs_membership_has_accessed_private_content
label: Member has accessed private content
description: 1 if a member has accessed any private content, 0 or null if not

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_pipeline
label: Pipeline
description: The pipeline with which this contact is currently associated

name: hs_prospecting_agent_actively_enrolled_count
label: Prospecting Agent Actively Enrolled Count
description: The number of active prospecting agent enrollments this contact has. This should be either 0 or 1

name: hs_prospecting_agent_last_enrolled
label: Prospecting Agent Last Enrolled
description: The last time the Prospecting Agent enrolled this contact

name: hs_registered_member
label: Registered member
description: Whether or not a contact is registered

name: hs_sequences_actively_enrolled_count
label: Number of sequences actively enrolled
description: The number of sequences actively enrolled.

name: hs_sequences_enrolled_count
label: Number of sequences enrolled
description: The number of sequences enrolled.

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the Contact based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
label: User IDs of all owners
description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Contact owner
description: The owner of a contact. This can be any HubSpot user or Salesforce integration user, and can be set manually or via Workflows.

name: hubspot_team_id
label: HubSpot Team
description: The team of the owner of a contact.

name: hubspotscore
label: HubSpot Score
description: The number that shows qualification of contacts to sales readiness. It can be set in HubSpot's Lead Scoring app.

name: owneremail
label: HubSpot Owner Email
description: A legacy property used to identify the email address of the owner of the contact. This property is no longer in use.

name: ownername
label: HubSpot Owner Name (legacy)
description: A legacy property used to identify the name of the owner of the contact. This property is no longer in use.

name: hs_analytics_average_page_views
label: Average Pageviews
description: Average number of pageviews per session for this contact. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_first_referrer
label: First Referring Site
description: URL that referred the contact to your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_first_timestamp
label: Time First Seen
description: First time the contact has been seen. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_first_touch_converting_campaign
label: First Touch Converting Campaign
description: Campaign responsible for the first touch creation of this contact.

name: hs_analytics_first_url
label: First Page Seen
description: First page the contact visited on your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_first_visit_timestamp
label: Time of First Session
description: First time the contact visited your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_last_referrer
label: Last Referring Site
description: Last URL that referred contact to your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_last_timestamp
label: Time Last Seen

name: hs_analytics_last_touch_converting_campaign
label: Last Touch Converting Campaign
description: Campaign responsible for the last touch creation of this contact.

name: hs_analytics_last_url
label: Last Page Seen
description: Last page the contact visited on your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_last_visit_timestamp
label: Time of Last Session
description: Timestamp for start of the most recent session for this contact to your website.

name: hs_analytics_num_event_completions
label: Number of event completions
description: Total number of events for this contact. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_num_page_views
label: Number of Pageviews

name: hs_analytics_source_composite_data

label: Original Traffic Source Drill-Down 1
description: Additional information about the source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_analytics_source_data_2
label: Original Traffic Source Drill-Down 2
description: Additional information about the source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_bing_ad_clicked

label: Bing click id
description: The msclkid url parameter extracted from the Activity recorded when a visitor lands on a tracked webpage

name: hs_clicked_linkedin_ad
label: Clicked on a LinkedIn Ad

name: hs_facebook_ad_clicked
label: Clicked Facebook ad
description: Whether contact has clicked a Facebook ad

name: hs_first_outreach_date

name: hs_latest_disqualified_lead_date

name: hs_latest_qualified_lead_date
label: Latest Qualified Lead Date

name: hs_latest_source

name: hs_latest_source_composite_data

name: hs_latest_source_data_1
label: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 1

name: hs_latest_source_data_2
label: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 2

name: hs_linkedin_click_id

name: hair_length
label: Hair Length
description: Hair length in inches (e.g. 6 inches, 8 inches)

name: hair_origin
label: Hair Origin
description: Origin/type of human hair used

name: hair_system_type
label: Hair System Type
description: The base type of hair system the client uses

name: maintenance_buyer
label: Maintenance Buyer
description: Has purchased maintenance products (adhesives, tapes, removers, care items)

name: next_steps
label: Next Steps
description: Current action items and next steps for this contact

name: preferred_communication_channel
label: Preferred communication channel
description: Identifies the contact's preferred communication channel for better outreach

name: preferred_factory
label: Preferred Factory
description: The factory typically used for this clients orders

name: product_preference
label: Product Preference
description: Customer's preferred hair system base type

name: units_per_year
label: Units Per Year
description: Typical number of hair system units the client orders per year

name: buyer_intent_level
label: Buyer Intent Level
description: Derived from gravity_score. hot=80+, warm=40-79, cold=<40.

name: chargeback_count
label: Chargeback Count
description: Number of payment disputes/chargebacks filed by this customer.

name: communication_sentiment
label: communication_sentiment
description: Deprecated after merge into customer_situation. Values remapped into the multiselect situation field before retirement.

name: customer_situation_briefing
label: Customer Situation Briefing
description: AI-generated 3-5 sentence summary of the customers situation based on WhatsApp conversation history and payment behavior. Updated by briefing script.

name: failed_payment_count
label: Failed Payment Count
description: Count of associated payment records with status = failed. Updated by sync script.

name: last_communication_date
label: Last Communication Date
description: Date of most recent associated Communications record (WhatsApp). Updated by sync script.

name: last_payment_status
label: Last Payment Status
description: Status of the customers most recent payment. Updated by sync script.

name: order_status_client
label: Order Status (Client View)
description: Customer-facing order status. Set by automation, not raw order data.

name: paired_po_id
label: Paired PO ID
description: HubSpot ID of the most recent Purchase Order linked to this contact.

name: recovery_campaign_enrolled
label: Recovery Campaign Enrolled
description: Whether the contact is currently enrolled in an active recovery workflow

name: total_lifetime_spend
label: Total Lifetime Spend
description: Sum of all succeeded payment amounts (hs_initial_amount) from associated Payments object. Updated by sync script.

name: current_commerce_engagement_score
label: Current Commerce Engagement Score
description: 0-100 score from recent order behavior, payment quality, and value signals.

name: current_email_engagement_score
label: Current Email Engagement Score
description: 0-100 score from native HubSpot email engagement signals.

name: current_engagement_age_days
label: Current Engagement Age Days
description: Days since freshest meaningful live engagement signal.

name: current_engagement_data_quality
label: Current Engagement Data Quality
description: Confidence level based on how many live data sources are available for this contact.

name: current_engagement_last_calculated_at
label: Current Engagement Last Calculated At
description: Timestamp of the most recent current engagement calculation run.

name: current_engagement_last_date
label: Current Engagement Last Date
description: Freshest meaningful live engagement date across email, web, sales, commerce, and communication signals.

name: current_engagement_level
label: Current Engagement Level
description: Banding for current engagement score.

name: current_engagement_momentum
label: Current Engagement Momentum
description: Interpretation of how fresh and active current engagement appears to be.

name: current_engagement_reason_summary
label: Current Engagement Reason Summary
description: Short explanation of the signals that drove the current engagement score.

name: current_engagement_score
label: Current Engagement Score
description: 0-100 current-state engagement score from native HubSpot activity and recent commerce signals.

name: current_intent_level
label: Current Intent Level
description: Banding for current intent score.

name: current_intent_score
label: Current Intent Score
description: 0-100 signal of current purchase intent from combined live activity.

name: current_sales_engagement_score
label: Current Sales Engagement Score
description: 0-100 score from recent sales activity and communication recency/sentiment.

name: current_web_engagement_score
label: Current Web Engagement Score
description: 0-100 score from web sessions, pageviews, and web recency.

name: unified_customer_health_band
label: Unified Customer Health Band
description: Primary operational band for unified customer health.

name: unified_customer_health_last_calculated_at
label: Unified Customer Health Last Calculated At
description: Timestamp of the most recent unified customer health calculation run.

name: unified_customer_health_reason_summary
label: Unified Customer Health Reason Summary
description: Short explanation of how the unified customer health score was derived.

name: unified_customer_health_score
label: Unified Customer Health Score
description: 0-100 primary customer health score combining historical baseline and current engagement.

name: unified_customer_health_source_mix
label: Unified Customer Health Source Mix
description: Indicates whether current or historical signals were more influential in the unified score.

name: unified_customer_health_version
label: Unified Customer Health Version
description: Version tag for the unified customer health model.

name: hsc_anniversary_type
label: HSC Anniversary Type
description: Type of anniversary to celebrate in J5-E3

name: hsc_current_system_user
label: HSC Current System User
description: True if contact already wears a hair system from any supplier

name: hsc_customer_milestone_summary
label: HSC Customer Milestone Summary
description: Pre-rendered milestone text for annual recap and renewal emails

name: hsc_estimated_annual_spend_individual
label: HSC Estimated Annual Spend (Individual)
description: Projected annual cost if contact continues buying individually

name: hsc_estimated_annual_spend_plan
label: HSC Estimated Annual Spend (Plan)
description: Projected annual cost on a subscription plan

name: hsc_estimated_plan_savings
label: HSC Estimated Plan Savings
description: Individual annual spend minus plan annual spend

name: hsc_has_local_partner
label: HSC Has Local Partner
description: True if a nearby affiliated stylist or location exists for this contact

name: hsc_last_order_value
label: HSC Last Order Value
description: Total value of the most recent completed order (USD)

name: hsc_last_spec_summary
label: HSC Last Spec Summary
description: Human-readable snapshot of last confirmed specs: base, density, hair type

name: hsc_nearest_partner_location
label: HSC Nearest Partner Location
description: Name and city of the nearest affiliated stylist or partner location

name: hsc_reorder_message_angle
label: HSC Reorder Message Angle
description: Which reorder messaging variant to use in J4 emails

name: hsc_reorder_window_open
label: HSC Reorder Window Open
description: True when contact is within their active reorder window

name: hsc_specs_locked
label: HSC Specs Locked
description: True when the contact's hair system specifications are finalized

name: hsc_subscription_deliveries_last_12m
label: HSC Subscription Deliveries Last 12m
description: Number of units delivered under this subscription in trailing 12 months

name: hsc_subscription_eligible
label: HSC Subscription Eligible
description: True when contact meets criteria for a subscription plan offer

name: hsc_subscription_last4
label: HSC Subscription Last 4
description: Last 4 digits of the payment card on file for the subscription

name: hsc_subscription_payment_link
label: HSC Subscription Payment Link
description: URL for self-service payment method update

name: hsc_subscription_plan_amount
label: HSC Subscription Plan Amount
description: Recurring plan amount (monthly or per-cycle)

name: hsc_subscription_plan_name
label: HSC Subscription Plan Name
description: Name of the active subscription plan, e.g. 3-Unit Plan

name: hsc_subscription_renewal_date
label: HSC Subscription Renewal Date
description: Date of next subscription renewal

name: hsc_subscription_status
label: HSC Subscription Status
description: Current hair system subscription/plan status

name: hsc_total_orders_last_12m
label: HSC Total Orders Last 12m
description: Count of completed orders in the trailing 12 months

name: hsc_total_orders_lifetime
label: HSC Total Orders Lifetime
description: Lifetime count of completed orders

name: hsc_vip_reward_choice
label: HSC VIP Reward Choice
description: VIP reward selected by contact in J5-E3

name: email_frequency_preference
label: Email Frequency Preference
description: Customer's preferred email frequency

name: subscription_preferences
label: Subscription Preferences
description: Email subscription preferences

name: hsl_effective_history_end
label: HSL Effective History End
description: Latest effective known history date across merged sources.

name: hsl_effective_history_start
label: HSL Effective History Start
description: Earliest effective known history date across merged sources.

name: hsl_merge_notes
label: HSL Merge Notes
description: Merge notes and overlap comments from the merged file.

name: hsl_snapshot_date
label: HSL Snapshot Date
description: Date this imported scoring snapshot was generated.

name: hsl_sources_present
label: HSL Sources Present
description: Source hubs/files that contributed to the contact summary.

name: hsc_attachment_preference
label: HSC Attachment Preference
description: Preferred attachment method

name: hsc_base_preference
label: HSC Base Preference
description: Preferred base type

name: hsc_customer_class
label: HSC Customer Class
description: Customer classification

name: hsc_customer_health_score
label: HSC Customer Health Score
description: Weighted health score 0-100

name: hsc_density_preference
label: HSC Density Preference
description: Preferred density percentage

name: hsc_experience_level
label: HSC Experience Level
description: Hair system experience level

name: hsc_hair_type_preference
label: HSC Hair Type Preference
description: Preferred hair type

name: hsc_last_known_system_family
label: HSC Last Known System Family
description: Branded model name (e.g. Lace Pro, Thin Skin Injected)

name: hsc_next_action_date
label: HSC Next Action Date
description: Operational due date for next action

name: hsc_preferred_channel
label: HSC Preferred Channel
description: Preferred communication channel (manual override)

name: hsc_primary_goal
label: HSC Primary Goal
description: Customer primary goal

name: hsc_reengagement_priority
label: HSC Reengagement Priority
description: Priority level for re-engagement outreach

name: hsc_relationship_state
label: HSC Relationship State
description: Current relationship state

name: hsc_reorder_readiness
label: HSC Reorder Readiness
description: Reorder timing readiness

name: hsc_risk_band
label: HSC Risk Band
description: Customer risk classification

name: lchs_engagement_pts
label: LCHS — Engagement Points
description: Pillar 4: Points from inbound communication — email and WhatsApp (0–20).

name: lchs_frequency_pts
label: LCHS — Frequency Points
description: Pillar 5: Points from order/deal frequency (0–10). 5+ orders=10, 3-4=8, 2=5, 1=3.

name: lchs_last_calculated
label: LCHS Last Calculated
description: Timestamp when the LCHS score was last computed for this contact.

name: lchs_ltv_pts
label: LCHS — LTV Points
description: Pillar 1: Points from lifetime payment value (0–25).

name: lchs_modifiers
label: LCHS — Modifiers
description: Sum of negative modifiers applied to the score (e.g. Crisis=-15, At Risk=-10, Chargeback=-10). Typically a negative number.

name: lchs_recency_pts
label: LCHS — Recency Points
description: Pillar 2: Points from payment recency (0–25). Higher = more recently paid.

name: lchs_score
label: LCHS Score
description: Legacy Customer Health Score (0–100). Composite of LTV, payment recency, subscription, engagement, and order frequency pillars.

name: lchs_subscription_pts
label: LCHS — Subscription Points
description: Pillar 3: Points from subscription status (0–20). Active=20, Paused=12, Unpaid=8, Expired=2–5.

name: lchs_tier
label: LCHS Tier
description: Health score tier derived from lchs_score. Used for campaign segmentation and outreach prioritization.

name: crisis_affected
label: Crisis Affected
description: Was this customer impacted by the Q3-Q4 2025 fulfillment crisis?

name: outreach_status
label: Outreach Status
description: Tracks re-engagement outreach progress for recovery campaigns

name: re_engagement_priority
label: Re-engagement Priority
description: Priority level for recovery outreach. Based on LTV, recency, and response likelihood.

name: reason_dormant
label: Reason Dormant
description: Why customer went inactive

name: cart_abandonment_count
label: Cart Abandonment Count
description: Number of times customer abandoned cart

name: average_order_value
label: Average Order Value
description: Average value of customer orders

name: days_since_last_purchase
label: Days Since Last Purchase
description: Number of days since last purchase

name: last_product_purchased
label: Last Product Purchased
description: Most recent product name

name: last_purchase_date
label: Last Purchase Date
description: Most recent purchase

name: ltv_total_revenue
label: Total Lifetime Revenue
description: Customer LTV

name: next_expected_reorder_date
label: Next Expected Reorder Date
description: Projected next purchase date based on reorder cycle and last purchase

name: number_of_orders
label: Number of Orders
description: Total purchase orders

name: reorder_cycle_days
label: Reorder Cycle (Days)
description: Days between purchases

name: churn_risk_score
label: Churn Risk Score
description: Composite of days_since_last_order (base) + engagement_trend (modifier) + support_ticket_sentiment (modifier). Updated daily.

name: clv_total
label: Customer Lifetime Value
description: Rollup of all closed-won deal amounts for this contact. Bronze <$200 | Silver $200-$500 | Gold $500-$1500 | VIP $1500+.

name: communication_preference
label: Communication Preference
description: Auto-detected from last 5 interactions. >3 WhatsApp = whatsapp | >3 email = email | else both. Manual override supported.

name: customer_profile
label: customer_profile
description: Deprecated after migration to customer_situation. Values remapped into the multiselect situation field before retirement.

name: customer_situation
label: customer_situation
description: Primary multiselect situation field combining commercial state and emotional/operational context. Use this instead of separate customer state and communication sentiment fields.

name: customer_tier
label: Customer Tier
description: Derived from clv_total. Bronze <$200 | Silver $200-$500 | Gold $500-$1500 | VIP $1500+.

name: days_since_last_order
label: Days Since Last Order
description: TODAY() - last_purchase_date in days. Null if no purchase. Updated daily at 6am.

name: next_best_action
label: Next Best Action
description: Decision logic: lifecycle + lead_status + days_since_last_order + plan_progress. Updated daily and on deal/stage changes.

name: order_readiness_score
label: Order Readiness Score
description: % of hair system spec fields filled. 8 fields x 12.5pts each: base_size, density, color, curl_pattern, grey_pct, length, origin, system_type.

name: reorder_due_date
label: Reorder Due Date
description: last_purchase_date + reorder_cycle_days. Default cycle = 90 days if not set.

name: sales_priority
label: Sales Priority
description: Sales urgency tier. Seeded from pre-HubSpot priority segment, updated by workflows.

name: suggested_marketing_segment
label: Suggested Marketing Segment
description: Auto-derived marketing audience from contact state. Drives list membership, campaign inclusion, and content selection. Updated daily and on key triggers. Never set manually.

name: support_ticket_sentiment
label: Support Ticket Sentiment
description: Aggregated sentiment from last 3 support tickets. Set by workflow on ticket closed.

name: acquisition_channel_detail
label: Acquisition Channel Detail
description: Granular acquisition source - specific affiliate, ad campaign, or referral detail

name: affiliate_link_clicks
label: Affiliate link clicks
description: Tracks the number of clicks on an affiliate link for a contact, helping measure effectiveness
